description_long: This is a rectangular, black guitar amplifier with a rugged, textured exterior and reinforced metal corners, designed for durability in urban environments. The front features a large, black mesh speaker grille, behind which the speaker is housed, and a gold-toned control panel running along the top edge with multiple rotary knobs, buttons, and a power switch. The top of the unit has a sturdy handle for portability. The rear view reveals an open-back design, exposing the speaker cone and internal wiring, as well as a gold panel with technical information and branding. The sides are plain and solid, emphasizing the robust construction. This amplifier is suitable for use in garages, music venues, or on the street for live performances.
description: A rugged black guitar amplifier with a gold control panel, mesh speaker grille, and open-back rear exposing the speaker. Designed for durability and portability in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black mesh speaker grille, gold control panel with knobs and buttons, and the top handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, solid black textured surface and reinforced corners.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open-back design, visible speaker cone, internal wiring, and gold information panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the other side, with a plain black surface and reinforced corners.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo with the text 'Marshall' and 'P.A.' is visible on the rear speaker cone.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a fine, tightly-woven black mesh pattern with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located along the top front edge, featuring a row of rotary knobs, several buttons, indicator lights, and a power switch, all set on a gold background with labeled controls.
